title: Building Permit
description: Building or construction permit record from a municipal or county permitting authority.

permit_number.description: Official permit number. Commonly found in: city permit portal, county records.

permit_type.description: Type of permit. Commonly found in: permit portal, permit type field.

permit_status.description: Current status of the permit. Commonly found in: permit portal, status field.

address.description: Street address of the permitted property. Commonly found in: permit portal, property address field.

city.description: City of the permitted property. Commonly found in: permit portal.

county.description: County of the permitted property. Commonly found in: permit portal, county records.

state.description: State of the permitted property. Commonly found in: permit portal.

zip_code.description: ZIP code of the permitted property. Commonly found in: permit portal, property address.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: geocoding API, GIS data.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: geocoding API, GIS data.

parcel_number.description: Assessor's parcel number (APN). Commonly found in: permit portal, county assessor.

project_description.description: Description of the construction project. Commonly found in: permit portal, permit description field.

estimated_valuation_usd.description: Estimated value of the construction work in USD. Commonly found in: permit portal, valuation field.

square_footage.description: Square footage of the construction area. Commonly found in: permit portal, project details.

contractor_name.description: Name of the licensed contractor. Commonly found in: permit portal, contractor section.

contractor_license_number.description: Contractor license number. Commonly found in: permit portal, contractor section.

owner_name.description: Name of the property owner. Commonly found in: permit portal, owner section.

application_date.description: Date permit was applied for. Commonly found in: permit portal, dates section.

issued_date.description: Date permit was issued. Commonly found in: permit portal, dates section.

expiry_date.description: Date permit expires. Commonly found in: permit portal, dates section.

final_date.description: Date permit was finaled. Commonly found in: permit portal, dates section.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
